## “THE LEGNAIOLI CASE – INVESTIGATION”

“The event took place on JULY 3rd, 1978, at 17:45 pm, at Rua Padre Bernardino Bandeira, Penha neighborhood – São Paulo-SP. Next to the LEGNAIOLI family residence, there is a property with approximately 12 X 40 meters, in this land there is a small building and some small trees. On that date, Mr. Odirlei Legnaioli and his son DALTON were in the kitchen of that house; at that time the boy left the kitchen to look at something outside and his dog followed him. The house is abov
summary: On 3 Jul 1978 an 11-year-old boy in Penha, São Paulo witnessed a 10-m diameter metallic disc hovering 2 m above ground; a beam of light temporarily immobilized his dog and caused static electricity in his hair and clothes.
